identity.purpose: Identity anchor for continuity proof boundary

usage.signing: Session attestations, handoff documents, verification gates

key_type_note.explanation: This identity file contains an Ed25519 key pair used for continuity proof boundaries (session attestations, handoff documents). Cross-lane message signing and verification use a separate RSA-2048 key pair stored in .identity/private.pem and .identity/public.pem, registered in lanes/broadcast/trust-store.json under key_id 2eec06be0befc8d5. The two key types serve different purposes: Ed25519 for internal continuity proofs, RSA-2048 for JWS RS256 cross-lane attestation.
